if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'
dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb' or dbType == 'sqlserver'

mapper.select: select orgManager.org_id as deptId, person.code as managerCode, person.name as managerName from org_manager orgManager join org_person person on orgManager.manager_id = person.id where orgManager.org_id = #{deptId}

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'

select.if:
select curDept.id, curDept.code, curDept.name, curDept.dept_type as deptType, curDept.valid, curDept.full_path as fullPath, parentDept.code as parentCode, company.code as companyCode, company.full_name as companyFullName, company.short_name as companyShortName from org_department curDept left join org_company company on curDept.company_id = company.id left join org_department parentDept on curDept.parent_id = parentDept.id where company.id = #{companyId} and curDept.valid = 1 order by curDept.lay_no, curDept.sort
limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select * from (select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by lay_no,sort desc) as tempId, * from ( select curDept.id, curDept.lay_no, curDept.sort, curDept.code, curDept.name, curDept.dept_type as deptType, curDept.valid, curDept.full_path as fullPath, parentDept.code as parentCode, company.code as companyCode, company.full_name as companyFullName, company.short_name as companyShortName from org_department curDept left join org_company company on curDept.company_id = company.id left join org_department parentDept on curDept.parent_id = parentDept.id where company.id = #{companyId} and curDept.valid = 1 )as a )as a where a.tempId between #{sqlserverOffset} and #{pointer}
